title: GET /@username: minimal server-rendered profile page
description:
Implement a minimal HTML profile page at /@username. Shows: display name, bio (HTML rendered), avatar (if set), post count, follower/following counts, recent posts list. This is what people see when they paste a smallhold profile URL into a browser or share it on social media.

Agent workflow: No subagents needed — this is a small, self-contained HTML template.

Test discipline:
- Test that HTML is valid (use html5ever or just check for required elements)
- Test that bio HTML is sanitized (ammonia) — no script tags
- Test that unknown username returns 404

Defensive programming:
- All user-generated content (display name, bio) must go through ammonia sanitization before embedding in HTML
- Do not embed post content directly — link to individual post pages
acceptance_criteria: Profile page renders with correct display name and bio; unknown username 404; bio HTML is sanitized; page includes open graph meta tags for social sharing
